scope: single-seed bounded qualification of the element reverse head p(A|F_0,L_0,N) in the unified heterogeneous product-space backbone

analytic_q0: absorbing bridge copies revealed tokens exactly
the terminal transition has reveal probability one and cannot retain MASK
t_F=t_L=0 leaves translation-quotient coordinates and lattice latents exact
the inactive zero-noise torus score is finite and identically zero
element-only optimization leaves coordinate and lattice terminal heads unchanged

mechanism.state: 118 chemical tokens plus one absorbing MASK token
mechanism.clock_contract: t_A is randomized-stratified on [0.001,0.999], while t_F=t_L=0 exactly
mechanism.loss: cross entropy for clean chemical identity, averaged only over nodes masked by the analytic forward path
mechanism.reverse: exact finite-step absorbing categorical bridge driven by predicted clean-element logits
observed_side_information: clean lattice volume and trace-free shape
unchanged: separate modality clocks and per-block time FiLM
optimizer, EMA, batch size and model capacity used by J1-C2

decision_rule.pass: qualify only the element reverse head p(A|F_0,L_0,N) and permit a separately frozen L1 lattice-head qualification; do not start M1 or joint generation
decision_rule.fail: stop before L1 and localize failure to teacher-forced categorical denoising or free-running categorical composition; do not add steps, seeds, vocabulary masks or target composition input
decision_rule.boundary: E1 cannot change historical H1a, qualify free joint generation, or authorize M1/J2, H1b-H6, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
